purpose: Prompt protocol for live Codex-style and Claude-style execution of the AI Scientist-v2 paper-derived skill.
evidence_boundary: Prompt packet only; live agent responses must be collected separately after the remote LLM provider recovers.
user_prompt: Given the PaperToSkill idea, produce a small local agent-run plan inspired by AI Scientist-v2. The plan must preserve generalized idea generation, the four-stage experiment manager, node lifecycle, debug/refine branching, replication and aggregation, visual review, limitations, ethics, and harness-transfer adaptations.
output_contract: A concise run objective for the PaperToSkill experiment.
A four-stage table covering preliminary investigation, hyperparameter tuning, research agenda execution, and ablation studies.
A node lifecycle schema with plan, code/action, execution result or error, metrics, feedback, status, and next action.
A debug/refine policy that treats buggy and non-buggy nodes differently.
A replication and aggregation plan with random seeds and summarized metrics.
A visual or VLM-style review plan for figures/tables/logs.
Limitations, ethics, and disclosure notes copied or adapted from the source-backed skill.
A transfer-adaptation note explaining what changed for the target harness.
evaluation_notes: Do not claim live experimental success unless an actual run was executed.
Preserve source-backed claims separately from harness-specific adaptations.
Record missing tools or unavailable execution privileges as limitations, not silent assumptions.

context_variants.label: PaperToSkill generated skill with transfer notes
Generated skill with Transfer Notes removed

target_harnesses.label: Codex-style coding-agent harness
target_harnesses.instructions: Act as a coding research agent using the provided context as a skill. Produce an executable local plan with file artifacts, commands, validation checks, and stop conditions. Be explicit about what is source-backed versus adapted for the local Codex workspace.

target_harnesses.label: Claude-style project prompt harness
target_harnesses.instructions: Act as a project-level research assistant using the provided context as reusable project instructions. Produce a harness-neutral plan that a Claude-style agent could follow, including assumptions, unavailable tools, validation checks, and transfer-specific adaptations.
